The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.

There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

dailyNews.description: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.

dailyNews.title: Why are the US, Iran arguing over duration of uranium enrichment ban?
dailyNews.description: The US reportedly wants Iran to stop enriching for 20 years. Iran has agreed to five years. Here's why that matters.

dailyNews.description: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse says he worries for his mother's frail health, while she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.

dailyNews.title: Gonzales hit with expulsion vote threat ahead of expected resignation
dailyNews.description: After Rep. Tony Gonzales, R-Texas, missed a deadline to step down, Rep. Teresa Leger Fernandez, D-N.M., moved Tuesday to introduce a resolution seeking his expulsion.

dailyNews.title: Antibiotic-resistant bacteria linked to severe stomach illness across US
dailyNews.description: A CDC alert warns that drug-resistant Shigella infections have increased substantially in the U.S., with cases spreading domestically since 2011.

dailyNews.description: Kevin M. Warsh vowed to divest a substantial amount of his more than $100 million in assets as he faces a complicated path to becoming the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

dailyNews.title: How Stephen Miller Is Adjusting Trump’s Immigration Agenda
dailyNews.description: After the chaos and death that ensued during the deportation raids in Minneapolis, Stephen Miller, the architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign, is changing course on immigration. Our White House correspondent Zolan Kanno-Youngs explains how the administration’s strategy is shifting.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Attacks on Pope Leo Create Fresh Midterm Headaches for G.O.P.
dailyNews.description: Republicans are counting on the votes of Catholics to maintain control of Congress.

dailyNews.title: In Leo, Trump Faces a Different Kind of Papal Opponent
dailyNews.description: Unlike his predecessor, Pope Leo XIV enjoys growing support from a broad swath of conservative Catholics.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Takeaways from the Times’s Look Inside D.H.S.
dailyNews.description: Eighty current and former employees talked to us about the Trump administration’s relentless push for mass deportations.

dailyNews.title: Stefanik addresses Swalwell allegations, says members of Congress need to "look in the mirror"
dailyNews.description: Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik of New York speaks to "CBS Mornings" about the resignations of Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell and Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales after both lawmakers were publicly accused of sexual misconduct. Stefanik also addresses President Trump's recent clash with Pope Leo over the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: More U.S.-Iran peace deal talks are in discussion, White House says
dailyNews.description: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at a trickle, despite President Donald Trump proclaiming that a ceasefire with Iran depended on it reopening.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
